info.name: Moyasar Payments API Reference Fixtures
info.description: Small maintained request/response fixtures used as local reference material. Amounts are in minor currency units and authentication is HTTP Basic Auth with the secret key as the username.

response.name: Created - Paid
response.body:
{
  "id": "a1168bd1-47a4-4b97-8a50-dd5caaccacf2",
  "status": "paid",
  "amount": 10000,
  "fee": 230,
  "currency": "SAR",
  "refunded": 0,
  "captured": 10000,
  "amount_format": "100.00 SAR",
  "fee_format": "2.30 SAR",
  "refunded_format": "0.00 SAR",
  "captured_format": "100.00 SAR",
  "ip": "203.0.113.10",
  "created_at": "2026-05-21T10:00:00.000Z",
  "updated_at": "2026-05-21T10:00:00.000Z",
  "refunded_at": null,
  "captured_at": "2026-05-21T10:00:00.000Z",
  "voided_at": null,
  "description": "Order order_123",
  "invoice_id": null,
  "callback_url": "https://example.com/callback",
  "metadata": {
    "orderId": "order_123",
    "paymentId": "order_123"
  },
  "source": {
    "type": "token",
    "transaction_url": null,
    "message": null
  }
}
